_awt_notes.lcp: Spec target is 2500 ms. The current ratchet (3800) holds the measured baseline — representative page LCP ≈ 3.0-3.5 ms under Lighthouse's simulated Slow-4G mobile profile, dominated by theme.css raw parse+transfer. Tighten toward 2500 when theme.css splits per-block (Stage 1.x follow-up recorded in the spec).
_awt_notes.inp: INP is a field metric and cannot be measured in a lab run; total-blocking-time is the lab proxy (spec INP ≤ 200 ms → TBT ≤ 200 ms).
